tools.name: analyze_seo_keywords
tools.description:
Extract top SEO keywords from marketing copy using term frequency.
    Returns: {keywords: [{word, score}], total_words}

tools.name: extract_meta_tags
tools.description:
Fetch a page and extract HTML meta tags (title, description, og:*).
    Returns: {title, description, og_title, og_description, meta: {name: content}}

tools.name: word_frequency
tools.description:
Count word frequencies in text for content/marketing analysis.
    Returns: {words: [{word, count, pct}], total}
